name: Regulatory Change Monitor
description: Runs on a schedule to query a designated source for regulatory updates, then generates a summary and routes it through a review gate before notifying stakeholders.
assumptions: A source ID pointing to a regulatory document feed or database is provided.
A reviewer is assigned and available within the review gate timeout.
The content generation prompt is appropriate for summarising regulatory changes.

config.message: Regulatory change summary is ready for distribution.

parameters.name: cronExpression
parameters.description: Cron expression defining the monitoring schedule (e.g. '0 9 * * 1' for weekly Monday 9am).

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone for the cron schedule.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: ID of the content source to query for regulatory updates.

parameters.name: sourceQuery
parameters.description: Search query to run against the regulatory source.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Profile ID used to generate the change summary.

parameters.name: summaryPrompt
parameters.default: Summarise the most significant regulatory changes found in the source material. Focus on obligations, deadlines, and compliance implications.
parameters.description: Prompt used for content generation of the regulatory summary.

parameters.name: notificationChannel
parameters.description: Notification channel after review approval: email, slack, or webhook.
